description: 10 episodes from the existing prod-v3 DGX corpus (tailnet_dgx_whisper / faster-whisper-large-v3, tailnet_dgx diarization). Curated from data already on disk — NOT re-fetched from the live feed. Both LLM arms read these exact transcripts, so ASR and diarization are constant and only the LLM varies. Paths point into gitignored .test_outputs; real podcast content never enters the tracked tree.
